findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (5.8 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 131 requests and 5804900 transferred bytes.
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce initial bytes by compressing assets, lazy-loading non-critical media, and removing unused scripts.

principles.summary: Rigorous same-session memory leak test has not been run yet; previous single/coarse heap data is not treated as a pass.

verdict: Homepage batch: 4 principles with issues; top concerns: medium be-sustainable: Heavy transfer on initial load (5.8 MB); medium be-private-and-secure: Large third-party/network surface; medium respect-user-preferences: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed.
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory uses baseline plus one lightweight scroll/nav/wait heap snapshot; this is a coarse signal, not a confirmed leak trace.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
